lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Oh, sorry, I didn't notice you there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I take it you're a coach?

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: That I am. Now get to the point, I'm very busy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the history of Gnome ball?

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: A great many years ago, before I was even born, there were two young Gnomes. Brothers to be exact.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: They were always arguing with each other over the most trivial things - who was the faster runner or who was the tallest.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: One day they were up at the swamp throwing stones at the toads.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Yep. You know nothing tastes better than toasted toad?

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Anyway, they decided to compete to see who could kill the most toads. This gradually became a daily game, to which they invited friends and family to join in.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: It all evolved from there. Creating a playing arena, making up teams and leagues.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the ball made from?

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: What with the swamp nearby, and their robust skin, there is nothing better to stretch over some common sand.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Well, of course. You humans know nothing!

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Ah, made from the finest thread in all the land.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: I have no time for jokes. It's a serious matter, we go through plenty of nets every day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So that's why you don't see many Gnomes with long hair?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The world makes sense at last.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: There's the good old one-two tactic.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: You don't know anything do you? You pass the ball onto a team mate, giving him all the attention of your opposition, and giving you the chance to run further ahead.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Well, he passes back to you and you've made an advantage. It's useful in a variety of situations!

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Well, don't forget that you can block the opposition whilst a team mate has the ball. Very useful if you want to stop or slow down anyone approaching him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Block for team mates. Got it.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: You'd look better if you were shorter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I meant in regards to scoring more goals!

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: I see. Your agility is important if you want to avoid being tackled, so that would be a good attribute to improve. Also many Gnomes say that being able to attack well with a ranged weapon makes you better at

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I should go away and work on those skills.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Yes, although playing the game itself will improve these skills too. Also you should remember that your distance from the goal affects your chance of scoring, so get close enough and your ranged ability won't matter as

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: OK. Have you noticed the different colour clothes for your opposing Gnomes?

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: The colours correspond to their skill level. The red ones are the professionals. They've been playing since before you were born! The orange ones are in the middle of their careers, whereas the yellow players know very

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: It's always good to get a group of friends to play with you. That way you can score goals more easily, and if you take it in turns to score the goals you'll all reap the rewards.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: You mean you've never heard of Speedy Sam The Striker or Norda 'Steal Arms' van Druman?

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Not even Great Thunder Legs MacKnee?

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Well, they're all richer than you'll ever be!

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Run faster! Don't be so lazy!

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Pass to your left! Pass now!

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: There are others to pass to you know

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again!

lines.speaker: Gnome Coach
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
